name: Discipline restoration
goal: Bring implementation, ADRs, docs, and security posture back into alignment after Phase-0 process-over-product drift. Close the BLOCKING and governance backlog, fix the gate/installer RCE surface, reconcile every ADR-vs-code divergence to a single source of truth, and re-establish that each workstream ends in a shipped, gate-verified capability rather than more process.
definition_of_done: Every Phase-1 BLOCKING-band item is closed and the deterministic gate is green on main with required status checks enforced (the four am_i_done matrix contexts).

The Phase-1 security RCE fixes (startup.sh format string, install.py SKILL_ROOT/repo containment, am_i_done verify allow-list, install.py .hedl-tier parsing and include-cycle guards, release.py version validation) have landed, each with a regression test that fails before the fix.
Every Phase-1 GOVERNANCE-band item is closed: for each reconciled topic, ADRs, code, tests, docs, and installer agree on one source of truth.

WORK-0018 (discipline tracker) is closed: a repo-health re-run shows the goal-displacement and validation-theatre findings resolved, and .work/reviews/ holds at least one real review run produced inside Phase 1.

Every remaining Phase-1 item (POSITIONING, MODEL, BLIND-SPOT, and the github-issues backend items) is either closed or explicitly reclassified to a later phase in .work/work.json with recorded rationale.
A Phase-1 existential review cycle (ADR-013) runs at the phase boundary and its verdict is recorded under .work/reviews/.
constraints: Discipline-restoration is the primary scope: reconciliation, security fixes, and retiring or justifying surplus process. A bounded set of forward-capability items ships as the explicit exception that proves a workstream ends in capability rather than process — the github-issues state backend (ADR-022: WORK-0007/0032/0033) and the workstream templates (ADR-020: WORK-0011). Any net-new artefact beyond these must be justified against shipped code (anti goal-displacement, WORK-0018).
Every security fix ships with a regression test that fails before the fix and passes after.
am_i_done.py remains deterministic — no inference added to the gate (ADR-003).
ADR reconciliations either implement the ADR or supersede it explicitly via historian review — no silent divergence between decision and code.
Existing pytest suite must pass throughout.
learning_goals: Does leading with the gate (over the process surface) change how the framework reads to a new adopter?
Can WORK-0010's implementation of ADR-019's recursive-workstream model preserve solo/flat usage unchanged?
Does dogfooding the github-issues backend on Hedl's own queue expose gaps the local-file backend hid?
assumptions_to_validate: The surplus process can be retired or justified without losing the discipline the gate enforces.
Reconciling ADRs to the implementation (rather than the reverse) is the cheaper path for most governance items.
